message:
test(coordinator): add emitEvent bus event and channel tests

Cover the coordinator's emitEvent method across state transition
scenarios that were previously untested:

- TestEmitEvent_AgentBusy: verify agent.busy bus event emitted when
  agent transitions to generating state from waiting
- TestEmitEvent_AgentError: verify EventAgentError channel event
  when agent enters error state
- TestEmitEvent_AgentRecovered: verify agent.recovered bus event
  when agent transitions from error back to waiting
- TestEmitEvent_NoEventForSameStatus: verify no event emitted when
  agent status hasn't changed (same → same transition)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
